issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing PRD or codebase.
The skill lacks any realistic example demonstrations of the plan generation process.

scenarios.name: Plan a feature from PRD
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced horizontal layer-by-layer phases with no ./plans/ output, no architectural-decisions header, and no user quiz; treatment delivered tracer-bullet vertical slices in a saved Markdown plan with durable decisions and the granularity check.

scenarios.name: Slice granularity check
scenarios.rationale: Baseline listed phases with file/function names and missed the template structure; treatment followed the plan template with per-phase user stories, end-to-end 'What to build' descriptions, and acceptance-criteria checkboxes.
